title: 🚨 NWS Severe: Winter Storm Warning
summary:
* WHAT...Heavy snow expected. Total snow accumulations between 5 and
10 inches.

* WHERE...Middle Yukon Valley.

* WHEN...From 1 AM Sunday to 4 PM AKDT Monday.

* IMPACTS...Travel could be very difficult.
If you must travel, keep an extra flashlight, food, and water in
your vehicle in case of an emergency.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Extreme: Blizzard Warning
summary:

could result in power outages.

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:

title: 🚨 NWS Minor: High Surf Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Breaking waves of 4 to 8 feet. Southwest winds up to 25
mph with gusts up to 40 mph.

* WHERE...Kachemak Bay, including the south side of Homer Spit.

* WHEN...2 PM Sunday through 8 AM Monday

* IMPACTS...Water and light debris (such as small rocks) may wash
over portions of the Homer Spit Road. Minor beach erosion is
possible.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...The worst conditions are expected ...
